personal.name: Gandhar Joshi
personal.title: Professional Video Editor & Graphic Designer
personal.tagline: Crafting Videos That Keep People Watching.
personal.description: I specialize in high-retention video editing for creators, brands, and agencies. From dynamic YouTube storytelling to podcasts and snappy short-form content, I build narratives that capture attention in the first 3 seconds and keep viewers hooked until the end.

services.title: YouTube Editing & Retention Strategy
services.description: High-retention editing tailored for the YouTube algorithm. Focuses on pacing, text callouts, sound design, and narrative hooks that optimize average percentage viewed (APV).

services.title: Short-Form Content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)
services.description: Fast-paced, high-energy editing designed to stop the scroll. Optimized for vertical layouts, including dynamic animated captions, sound effects, and rapid visual cuts.

services.title: Commercials & Brand Promos
services.description: Premium cinematic edits designed to build brand trust and drive conversions. Color graded to perfection, backed by custom sound design and slick motion graphics.

services.title: Motion Graphics & VFX
services.description: Sleek kinetic typography, custom logo animations, standard tracking, callouts, transitions, and screen replacements that elevate production value.

services.title: Sound Design & Audio Mixing
services.description: Deep, immersive audio environments utilizing sound effects (SFX), foley, music ducking, and voice enhancement to create a rich multi-sensory experience.

services.title: Color Grading (Rec709 & Creative LUTS)
services.description: Professional color correction and stylization. Matching multi-camera setups, repairing lighting issues, and applying creative looks to establish the correct mood.

projects.title: The Art of Solo Travel — Cinematic Travel Documentary
projects.description: A high-end cinematic narrative following a trek through Norway. Crafted using raw log footage with intense foley, natural soundscapes, and heavy color styling.

projects.title: How I Built an AI Startup in 24 Hours — High-Retention Vlog
projects.description: A fast-paced tech vlog designed for maximum viewer retention. Features split-screen animations, kinetic typography, and custom illustrations explaining complex technical details.

projects.title: Urban Flow — Streetwear Brand Commercial
projects.description: A high-energy, fast-paced commercial project featuring match cuts, speed ramps, and stylized VHS overlay assets designed to appeal to Gen-Z consumers.

projects.title: Future of VR Gaming — Tech Review & Explainer
projects.description: Detailed review editing featuring detailed overlay overlays, hardware zoom inserts, tracked visual callouts, and clean 3D motion graphics explaining VR optics.

projects.title: Micro-Doc: The 80-Year-Old Marathon Runner
projects.description: An emotional mini-documentary focusing on storytelling, voiceover-driven structure, ambient sound design, and warm, cinematic tones.

projects.title: TikTok/Reels: 3 Hacks to Save 10 Hours of Editing
projects.description: Vertical format (9:16) video with bold, colored word-by-word captions, visual sound effect triggers, zooms, and jump cuts designed to maximize retention.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.comment: Working with Alex changed everything. Our average viewer retention jumped from 42% to 58% in the first month. He doesn't just edit; he understands pacing, storytelling, and what keeps people watching.

testimonials.name: Marcus Chen
testimonials.comment: Alex delivered our commercial promos on a tight timeline, and the quality was outstanding. His sound design and color grading are top-tier. He's professional, communicates well, and hits every deadline.

testimonials.name: Elena Rostova
testimonials.comment: Alex's vertical short-form edits are pure gold. He knows exactly how to capture attention in the first second and design captions that look modern. Our short-form reach increased by 200% under his edits.
